text.title: Interview Note Synthesis (AI-Assisted) Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Interview Note Synthesis (AI-Assisted) output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: extracted_items populated with a typed value
clusters populated with a typed value
signal_themes populated with a typed value
ost_candidates populated with a typed value
synthesis_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
